## PimentCSS v1.0.0

First stable release of the accessible Caribbean design system from [Webmonster.tech](https://www.webmonster.tech) and [numera11y](https://www.numera11y.fr).

**Live site:** [piment.webmonster.tech](https://piment.webmonster.tech) · **Docs:** [/docs](https://piment.webmonster.tech/docs)

### Highlights

- OKLCH palettes with hex fallback and semantic light/dark tokens
- Unprefixed BEM-style component classes (`btn--primary`, `alert--success`, …)
- npm package `pimentcss`, Sass entry points, and `dist/pimentcss.min.css`
- Foundations, forms, navigation, data display, feedback, and composition patterns
- Astro documentation site with live previews, search, and axe-tested demos
- WCAG 2.2 AA target, focus rings, touch targets, reduced-motion tokens

### Install

```bash
npm install pimentcss
```

See [README](https://github.com/WebmonsterC/pimentCSS#installation) for Sass customization and CDN usage.

### Migration

Evolution of the upstream [Piment-Css](https://github.com/freepiment/Piment-Css) micro-framework. See [What's new](https://piment.webmonster.tech/docs/whats-new) and [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/WebmonsterC/pimentCSS/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
